TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qehuy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 55 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 53 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. maki qu kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qehuy hya' ga Piyaway. tay 'llaw na Qehuy hya' ga Raga'. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qeħuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa pijawaj. taj ʔllaw na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa raɣaʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qehuy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 55 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 53 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, binah lihuyan s'uli 9%. maki qu kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qehuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qehuy hya' ga Piyaway. tay 'llaw na Qehuy hya' ga Raga'. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qeħuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa pijawaj. taj ʔllaw na qeħuj ħjaʔ ɣa raɣaʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
